mapper.insert: INSERT INTO business_profile ( account_id, company_name, founded_date, biz_reg_no, verification_status, verified_at ) VALUES ( #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{foundedDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{bizRegNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{verificationStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{verifiedAt, jdbcType=DATE} )
